sourceSummary.oneLine: Intertek Testing Services Korea Ltd. test report for Nickel Chloride sample RT18R-S4277-011, dated Oct. 10, 2018.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Material test evidence for the submitted Nickel Chloride sample; the report states results refer only to the object tested and do not discharge legal obligations.
keyPoints: Applicant and manufacturer/vendor are Incheon chemical Co., Ltd.
Report number is RT18R-S4277-011-E and sample ID number is RT18R-S4277-011.
Cadmium, lead, mercury, hexavalent chromium, PBBs, and PBDEs were reported as N.D.
Testing used IEC 62321 reference methods with ICP-OES, UV-VIS Spectrophotometer, and GC/MS.

entities.name: Incheon chemical Co., Ltd.
entities.evidence: APPLICANT : Incheon chemical Co., Ltd.; MANUFACTURER/VENDOR : Incheon chemical Co., Ltd.

concepts.name: RoHS restricted substances testing
concepts.evidence: Cadmium (Cd); Lead (Pb); Mercury (Hg); Hexavalent Chromium (Cr 6+); Polybrominated Biphenyl (PBBs); Polybrominated Diphenyl Ether (PBDEs)

evidence.claim: The document is a test report dated Oct. 10, 2018.
evidence.evidenceText: TEST REPORT; REPORT NO. RT18R-S4277-011-E DATE: Oct. 10, 2018

evidence.claim: The submitted sample was Nickel Chloride with sample ID RT18R-S4277-011.
evidence.evidenceText: NAME/TYPE OF PRODUCT : Nickel Chloride; SAMPLE ID NO. : RT18R-S4277-011

evidence.claim: The applicant was Incheon chemical Co., Ltd.
The manufacturer/vendor was Incheon chemical Co., Ltd.
The sample was received on Oct. 01, 2018 and tested from Oct. 01, 2018 to Oct. 10, 2018.
evidence.evidenceText: SAMPLE RECEIVED : Oct. 01, 2018; TESTING DATE : Oct. 01, 2018 ~ Oct. 10, 2018

evidence.claim: Cadmium and lead were tested with reference to IEC 62321-5 Edition 1.0:2013 by acid digestion and ICP-OES.
evidence.evidenceText: IEC 62321-5 Edition 1.0 : 2013, by acid digestion and determined by ICP-OES

evidence.claim: Mercury was tested with reference to IEC 62321-4 Edition 1.0:2013 by acid digestion and ICP-OES.
evidence.evidenceText: IEC 62321-4 Edition 1.0 : 2013, by acid digestion and determined by ICP-OES

evidence.claim: Hexavalent chromium was tested with reference to IEC 62321-7-2 Edition 1.0:2017 by alkaline/toluene digestion and UV-VIS Spectrophotometer.
evidence.evidenceText: IEC 62321-7-2 Edition 1.0 : 2017, by alkaline/toluene digestion and determined by UV-VIS Spectrophotometer

evidence.claim: PBBs and PBDEs were tested with reference to IEC 62321-6 Edition 1.0:2015 by solvent extraction and GC/MS.
evidence.evidenceText: IEC 62321-6 Edition 1.0 : 2015, by solvent extraction and determined by GC/MS

evidence.claim: Cadmium, lead, mercury, hexavalent chromium, PBBs, and PBDEs results were reported as N.D.
evidence.evidenceText: RESULT; Cadmium (Cd) ... N.D.; Lead (Pb) ... N.D.; Mercury (Hg) ... N.D.; Hexavalent Chromium (Cr 6+) ... N.D.; Polybrominated Biphenyl (PBBs) ... N.D.; Polybrominated Diphenyl Ether (PBDEs) ... N.D.

evidence.claim: The report states test results refer only to the object tested.
evidence.evidenceText: The test results presented in this report refer only to the object tested.

evidence.claim: The report states it is not related to the scope of Korea laboratory accreditation scheme.
evidence.evidenceText: This report is not related to the scope of Korea laboratory accreditation scheme.
